title: Fida Retractable Dog Lead, 5m/16ft Dog Leads for Large Dogs up to 50KG, Extendable Dog Lead with Green Reflective Ring for Daily Walking
features: 【A Gift for Enhanced Security】 As a token of our appreciation for choosing Fida retractable dog lead, we are thrilled to present you with a thoughtful gift - a chew proof steel wire rope! No more worrying about your furry friend breaking free from the retractable dog lead. Now you can confidently explore the great outdoors without any safety concerns.

【Stay Visible, Stay Safe】 Our extendable dog lead features a super reflective ring and vibrant yellow webbing, making nighttime walks safer than ever! This high-visibility color will make your furry friend stand out amongst nature's backdrop, allowing you to spot them instantly in crowded parks. Feel reassured knowing that passing cars and pedestrians will easily spot you and your precious pooch as you walk together at dusk or dawn.

【Unleash Their Freedom】 Designed specifically for medium to large dogs weighing 20-50kg, our durable retractable dog lead gives them the freedom they deserve while still keeping them under control. With 360° tangle-free inlet, no more frustrating moments of twisted leashes slowing you down or causing discomfort.

【Effortless Control with Every Step】 Thanks to the handy bigger button and quick lock system on this retractable dog lead, combined with its ergonomic handle and spacious design for your hand, you'll experience unparalleled comfort and effortless control over your lively pup's movements. Take charge with ease as you navigate bustling streets or busy parks; guaranteeing both your enjoyment and theirs.

【Responsible Customer Service】 Maybe nobody cares, but we care. Fida takes responsibility for every single product. We commit 30 days' money back without any reason and a 1-year warranty, so you can shop with confidence. If you have any issues, contact us, we are here 24/7!
description: Product Description Why Choose Fida Retractable Dog Lead with Reflective Design for Safe Walking? High Visibility: Safety is our priority! This 5m retractable dog lead with super reflective ring enhances visibility in low-light conditions, keeping both you and your precious dog safe during evening walks or outdoor adventures. Chew-Proof Steel Wire Rope: The extra 40cm anti-chew wire rope adds durability and resilience against teething puppies or aggressive chewers. Heavy Duty: Engineered from durable materials, this heavy duty retractable dog lead is built to withstand regular use. Easy to Use: This retractable dog lead was designed with a user-friendly mechanism, allowing for effortless control and quick adjustments. Benefit from the easy one-handed operation, allowing you to have complete control over your dog. Comfort Handle: The ergonomic design of the comfort handle provides a pleasant walking experience for both you and your furry friend. It offers a firm grip while reducing strain on your hand. Experience superior comfort during long walks or runs with its anti-slip properties that provide enhanced control and stability. No More Tangle: With its innovative anti-twist inlet, this extendable dog lead ensures your pet has freedom of movement without any frustrating knots or disruptions.
